title: Clinogyne inaequilatera
intro: I couldn't find any information about the plant Clinogyne inaequilatera.
taxonomy: Clinogyne inaequilatera is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a part of the genus Clinogyne. Clinogyne inaequilatera is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The classification of this plant includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its order as Celastrales. Further classification includes its family as Celastraceae, genus as Clinogyne, and species as C. inaequilatera.
